title: Piquant Crispy Kenyan Chicken Kebabs
description: A crowd-pleasing Kenyan dish featuring marinated chicken, malai, and wok-hei flavors, served in an agave leaf vessel, this recipe combines Mediterranean-friendly ingredients with a mustardy and crispy twist.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together yogurt, lemon juice, garam masala, cumin, smoked paprika, salt, and black pepper.
Add the chicken pieces to the bowl and mix until they are well coated with the marinade.
Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for at least 2 hours or overnight.
Preheat a grill or grill pan to medium-high heat.
Thread the marinated chicken pieces onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Brush the grill or grill pan with mustard oil to prevent sticking.
Grill the chicken kebabs for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally, until they are cooked through and slightly charred.
Brush the kebabs with agave nectar during the last minute of grilling.
Serve the kebabs hot in agave leaf vessels, garnished with fresh cilantro and a side of wok-hei flavored sauce.
